name: LinkedIn Recruiter: compose bulk InMail from a template ({Nombre} chip) — gated
description: Messages a project's UNCONTACTED candidates with a template {{body}} — switches to LinkedIn's native 'uncontacted' pipeline stage (SHORTLISTED) and select-alls it, so already-contacted/replied candidates are not re-messaged. Replaces each literal {Name}/{Nombre} token with the LinkedIn variable CHIP. Sets the subject (handles the subject-reveal quirk). send=false (default) STOPS for a snapshot preview; send=true clicks Send (REAL InMail). Params: project_url, body, subject, send.
